title: Spirillus zosterifolius
taxonomy: Spirillus zosterifolius is classified as a genus within the family Cyperaceae. It belongs to the kingdom Plantae, and further classified into the phylum Magnoliophyta, class Liliopsida, and order Poales. Spirillus zosterifolius is a type of sedge, which is a common group of monocots. The classification of Spirillus zosterifolius is still under ongoing research and may be subject to revision. This species is relatively rare and is often found in specific geographic locations.
